topic: Should we adopt the meta-marketing skill plan at /Users/mehmetnuraydin/.claude/plans/like-council-now-we-serialized-petal.md as-is, or what must change before commit? Critique: (1) DX across CLI + agent chat, (2) edge cases (auth, rate limits, env, multi-account, asset binaries, dry-run safety), (3) dreamcontext architectural fit (folder convention, JSON-vs-MD, council reuse, sleep consolidation, hooks), (4) dashboard visibility (Brain graph nodes, read-only chat-back UX, perf charts, recharts dep), (5) implementation sequencing (ship-first slice, risky bits, what to defer).
Should we migrate from Postgres to Firestore?
